description: Breaking Fantasy Football player news along with the impact for fantasy managers

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Seahawks officially placed RB Zach Charbonnet on the PUP list.
items.impact: Charbonnet continues to make his way back from offseason knee surgery. He remains without a clear timetable to return.
items.title: Zach Charbonnet (knee) placed on PUP list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Raiders corner Jermod McCoy plans to sign his rookie contract on Wednesday.
items.impact: McCoy fell in the NFL Draft due to injury concerns. The Raiders rookies report to training camp on Thursday.
items.title: Jermod McCoy expected to sign rookie contract Wednesday

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Cameron Wolfe reports that Tetairoa McMillan is expected to see more usage in the slot this season.
items.impact: McMillan started to see more snaps in the slot during the second half of his rookie season last year. Wolfe notes that the Panthers believe Chris Brazzell II will be able to play on the outside that will allow McMillan the opportunity to play more in the slot. He should be able to take advantage of mismatches in the slot as he looks to take a step forward heading into his second season in the NFL.
items.title: Tetairoa McMillan expected to see more slot usage this season

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Panthers placed Bobby Brown III on the non-football injury list.
items.impact: Brown can be activated at any time during training camp.
items.title: Bobby Brown III (hamstring) placed on NFI list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Panthers GM Dan Morgan said Tershawn Wharton will miss the start of training camp.
items.impact: Wharton can be activated at any point during training camp.
items.title: Tershawn Wharton (neck) to miss start of training camp

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Panthers placed OL Ikem Ekwonu on the PUP list.
items.impact: Ekwonu tore his patellar tendon during January's playoff loss to the Rams. He is expected to return at some point this season.
items.title: Ikem Ekwonu placed on PUP list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Panthers GM Dan Morgan told reporters WR Xavier Legette "attacked the offseason."
items.impact: Legette lost his starting role in the middle of last season. Morgan said he is in a "great head space" and in "really great shape." He is likely to remain off the fantasy radar.
items.title: Xavier Legette 'attacked the offseason'

items.author: Garrett Ball
items.desc: Deebo Samuel says he feels like he has "three, four good years left" to play in the NFL as he searches for a new team this offseason, with former teammates making it known they want him returning to San Francisco.
items.impact: Samuel wasn't what the Commanders hoped for last season, but it's surprising that Samuel has seen so little interest from NFL teams. He likely finds himself joining a roster during training camp, once teams sort out their depth chart and what they have on their rosters and realize they need better depth.
items.title: Deebo Samuel feels he has 'three, four good years left'

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Seahawks released TE Harrison Bryant.
items.impact: Bryant will figure to seek another opportunity.
items.title: Harrison Bryant released by Seahawks

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Seahawks signed second-year CB Brandon Johnson.
items.impact: Johnson will add depth in the secondary for Seattle heading into training camp.
items.title: Brandon Johnson signs with Seahawks

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Sam LaPorta was fully cleared earlier in July for training camp.
items.impact: LaPorta is working his way back from a herniated disc injury. The Lions are expected to determine his level of involvement, but he's expected to soon be a full-go.
items.title: Sam LaPorta (back) fully cleared for training camp

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Patriots placed RB Terrell Jennings on the non-football injury list.
items.impact: Jennings can be activated at any time during training camp.
items.title: Terrell Jennings placed on NFI list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Patriots placed CJ Dippre on the PUP list.
items.impact: Dippre can be activated at any time during training camp.
items.title: CJ Dippre placed on PUP list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Patriots placed Harold Landry III on the PUP list.
items.impact: Landry is recovering from offseason knee surgery. He can be activated at any point during training camp.
items.title: Harold Landry III (knee) placed on PUP list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Dolphins placed WR Chris Bell on the non-football injury list.
items.impact: Bell is recovering from a torn ACL suffered in November while at Louisville. He can be activated at any time time during training camp.
items.title: Chris Bell (knee) placed on NFI list

items.author: Brenton Kemp
items.desc: The Browns have waived cornerback Dom Jones (knee) with a failed physical designation.
items.impact: Jones played eight games for the Browns last season but suffered a season-ending knee injury in November, and it appears he still hasn't fully recovered. The Browns signed former Broncos cornerback Damarri Mathis on Tuesday.
items.title: Dom Jones (knee) waived by Browns

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Panthers placed Jaycee Horn on the non-football injury list with a foot injury.
items.impact: Horn is dealing with a minor injury. He is expected to return early in training camp.
items.title: Jaycee Horn (foot) placed on NFI list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Panthers placed OL Taylor Moton on the non-football injury list.
items.impact: Moton was diagnosed with blood clots in his lung and will miss the start of the 2026 NFL season. According to reports, he is responding well to treatment and will be assessed daily by the Panthers medical staff.
items.title: Taylor Moton (blood clot) placed on NFI list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Bucky Irving said he expects to be "good to go" for training camp.
items.impact: Irving made the statement at his annual youth football camp. He has been limited to start the offseason program working his way back from offseason shoulder surgery after he played through a shoulder injury last season. The Bucs backfield will be a situation to monitor in training camp following their free agency addition of Kenneth Gainwell.
items.title: Bucky Irving (shoulder) says he will be good to go for training camp

items.author: Garrett Ball
items.desc: Jacoby Brissett and the Arizona Cardinals have still yet to come to an agreement on Brissett's contract situation with the players scheduled to report to camp within the coming days.
items.impact: It's getting down to the wire for this situation to work out, and while you can't fault Brissett for wanting his money, every day he delays gives newcomers Carson Beck and Gardner Minshew more chances to get reps in with the team. With how the season is projected to go, it's likely Beck gets to start anyway, and Brissett, while productive, only won a single game as a starter, which is not helping his case for additional money.
items.title: Jacoby Brissett: no resolution for contract dispute before Cardinals report

items.author: Garrett Ball
items.desc: Jordyn Brooks has signed a three year, $51.3 million extension with the Miami Dolphins.
items.impact: Brooks is coming off of a year in which he led the NFL in tackles and a First Team All-Pro selection. He should be an anchor for the Dolphins defense in what's largely seen as a rebuilding year.
items.title: Jordyn Brooks signs three year, $51 million deal with Miami

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: Jordan Whitehead has been cleared to resume his NFL career after undergoing neck surgery.
items.impact: Whitehead suffered a serious neck injury in a car crash last year that led to him requiring surgery. He has visited the Colts and Texans with more visits expected to be coming up.
items.title: Jordan Whitehead (neck) cleared to resume NFL career

items.author: Garrett Ball
items.desc: The Patriots have signed defensive end Isaiah Iton.
items.impact: Iton didn't play in 2025 after being placed on Injured Reserve, but is getting a second chance in 2026. It's unlikely he is much more than a practice squad addition this season.
items.title: Isaiah Iton signs with New England Patriots

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Seahawks placed Tyrone Broden on the PUP list.
items.impact: Broden is still recovering from an injury he suffered last season.
items.title: Tyrone Broden placed on PUP list

items.author: Ari Koslow
items.desc: The Seahawks placed RB Kenny McIntosh on the PUP list.
items.impact: McIntosh is continuing to work his way back from a knee injury he suffered last season.
items.title: Kenny McIntosh placed on PUP list

title: Fantasy Player News
